### `id`

integer

### `date_modified`

string (date-time)

The last moment when the item was modified. A value in year 1750 indicates the value is unknown

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `date_created`

string (date-time)

The moment when the item was created.

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `hour`, `lt`, `lte`, `minute`, `month`, `range`, `second`, `year`

### `sha1`

string

unique ID for the document, as generated via SHA1 of the binary file or text data

### `blocked`

boolean

Should this item be blocked from indexing by search engines?

### `date_blocked`

string (date)

The date that this opinion was blocked from indexing by search engines

Lookups: `day`, `gt`, `gte`, `lt`, `lte`, `month`, `range`, `year`

### `processing_complete`

boolean

Is audio for this item done processing?

### `stt_status`

integer

The status of the Speech to Text for this item?

Choices (6):

| Value | Label |
|---|---|
| `0` | Speech to Text Needed |
| `1` | Speech to Text Complete |
| `2` | Speech to Text Failed |
| `3` | Transcription does not match audio |
| `4` | File size is bigger than 25 MB |
| `5` | File does not exist |

integer

### `source`

string | array of string

the source of the audio file, one of: C (court website), H (brad heath archive)

| Value | Label |
